Uncovered lines: 59-60, 80, 82, 85-86, 90, 92-94, 97-103, 105, 107-111, 117

```rust
pub fn load_all(&mut self) -> Result<()>
```

Loads all YAML files from VFS and parses them into the includes map. Currently untested — needs a test that creates temp directories with .yaml files and verifies they get loaded and parsed. Should also test the warn path for unparseable YAML and non-yaml files being skipped.
